reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, me presente a realizar un servicio en boxes y me atendieron de buena manera, explicándome todos los detalles de los servicio ofrecidos y sus beneficios.
Del Full muy buenos cafés, siempre atentos a los clientes y sus necesidades. Lo mismo que en la playa!
Y el chico del lavado te deja el auto impecable!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! I went in for a service at the service bay and they treated me well, explaining all the details of the services offered and their benefits. The Full service has great coffee, and they're always attentive to customers and their needs. The same goes for the beach!
And the car wash guy leaves your car spotless!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3OGNYd0V3EAE
